case_title: SONYA ROSE VS. MERCY HOUSING, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
OBJECTION HEARING FEB-17-2012 (610)
ORDER RE: DEFENDANTS'MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF SONYA ROSE; & REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF SONYA ROSE IS GRANTED. MS. ROSE SHALL APPEAR FOR A DEPOSITION AND PRODUCE THE DOCUMENTS DESCRIBED IN THE DEPOSITION NOTICE AT THE OFFICES OF DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $720.00. WITHIN 20 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY THE SANCTIONS VIA A CHECK OR MONEY ORDER PAYABLE TO MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. OR CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO. ORDER SIGNED. ERNST HALPERIN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

MOTION To Compel Deposition Of Pltf Sonya Rose; & Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Sonya Rose is GRANTED. Ms. Rose shall appear for a deposition and produce the documents described in the deposition notice at the offices of Defendant's counsel within 30 days of the date of this order. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $720.00. Within 20 days of entry of this order, Plaintiff shall pay the sanctions via a check or money order payable to Mercy Housing Management Group, Inc. or Catholic Charities CYO of the Archdiocese of San Francisco. Order signed. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
